'''Edda Gast''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] and the [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] behind the mutating and "Humanizing" of alien species in an attempt to expand their minds allowing them to think and feel like [[Human/Legends|Humans]]. Some of the main species that were used in [[Doctor/Legends|Dr.]] Gast's experiments included [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorreans]] such as [[Voort saBinring]], [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]], and [[Talz/Legends|Talz]].

==Biography==
The chief of the [[Project Chubar]] was her uncle, Dr. [[Tuzin Gast]], but he began to love his creations and committed suicide with the more violent specimens. Edda then became the main scientist of the project.

Gast was captured by [[Wraith Squadron]], a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Commando/Legends|commando]] unit, after their raid of the [[Binring Biomedical Product|Binring facilities]] failed. She was promised immunity from prosecution by [[Nawara Ven]] of [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] after giving all information on [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]] to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

During negotiations with Nawara Ven on board the Mon Ramonda just prior to the battle of Jussafet Four an assassination attempt was made on her by one of Zsinj's own [[Project Minefield]] subjects, but thwarted by Ven. She was believed dead, but in reality was saved by Ven, making her new identity seem even more secure.

She was arrogant, and [[Speciesism|speciesist]], but believed she would get away without punishment. Ven offered her a chance to do good with her life, but she took her reward of half a million [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|Imperial credits]], which she picked over New Republic credits. It was confiscated on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] and she was arrested on the charge of smuggling. Then Ven pointed out that under New Republic law, the smuggling of large sums of Imperial credits brought with it the charge of sedition. Her last action was to spit on Ven when she thought he set her up.

==Appearances==
